Operation 'getProducts' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Original summary is generic and doesn't indicate the input requirement (product IDs). Description lacks clarity about input format and use cases. Enhanced summary to be action-oriented and include the key input requirement. Expanded description to clarify input format, add use case context, and improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Returns product details for multiple products.
data.current_description: Allows access to multiple product details with a single request. Only products that are online and assigned to a site catalog are returned. The maximum number of product IDs that you can request is 24. In addition to product details, the availability, images, price, bundled_products, set_products, recommendations, product options, variations, shipping_methods, and promotions for the products are included, as applicable.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve details for multiple products by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for up to 24 products in a single request. Returns only online products assigned to the site catalog. Response includes product details, pricing, availability, images, variations, bundled/set products, recommendations, product options, shipping methods, and applicable promotions. Requires a comma-separated list of product IDs (SKUs) as input. Useful for populating product listing pages or comparing multiple products.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't indicate the input requirement (product IDs). Description lacks clarity about input format and use cases. Enhanced summary to be action-oriented and include the key input requirement. Expanded description to clarify input format, add use case context, and improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getCategories' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, not_actionable. Original summary is vague about the input requirement (category IDs). Description uses unclear phrasing ('when you use the URL template') and lacks actionable context. Enhanced summary to be action-oriented and specify input requirement. Improved description with clearer input format explanation, use cases, and better structure for AI agent interpretation.

data.current_summary: Returns category and subcategory details for one or more categories.
data.current_description: When you use the URL template, the server returns multiple categories (a result object of category documents). You can use this template to obtain up to 50 categories in a single request. You must enclose the list of IDs in parentheses. If a category identifier contains parenthesis or the separator sign, you must URL encode the character.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve details for multiple categories by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for up to 50 categories in a single request. Accepts a comma-separated list of category IDs enclosed in parentheses. Returns a result object containing category documents with hierarchical relationships. Category identifiers containing parentheses or separator characters must be URL-encoded. Useful for building category navigation structures and understanding category hierarchies for storefront organization.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about the input requirement (category IDs). Description uses unclear phrasing ('when you use the URL template') and lacks actionable context. Enhanced summary to be action-oriented and specify input requirement. Improved description with clearer input format explanation, use cases, and better structure for AI agent interpretation.

message: Operation 'getCategory' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, vague_description. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description has clarity issues with awkward phrasing ('when you use the URL template') and lacks actionable structure. Enhanced description to clarify the 'levels' parameter behavior, explain the online/offline category distinction more clearly, include performance considerations, and add use case context for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Returns category and subcategory details for a single category.
data.current_description:
When you use the URL template, the server returns a category identified by the ID. By default, the server
also returns the first level of subcategories, but you can specify an additional level using the levels
parameter.

This endpoint fetches both online and offline categories. For offline categories, only the top-level 
category is returned, not offline subcategories.

Using a large value for levels can cause performance issues when there is a large and deep category tree.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a single category by ID, including subcategories based on the specified depth level. By default, returns the category and its first-level subcategories. Use the 'levels' parameter to retrieve additional subcategory levels (caution: large values may impact performance with deep category trees). Returns both online and offline categories, but offline categories only include the top-level category without subcategories. Useful for building category navigation and understanding category hierarchies.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description has clarity issues with awkward phrasing ('when you use the URL template') and lacks actionable structure. Enhanced description to clarify the 'levels' parameter behavior, explain the online/offline category distinction more clearly, include performance considerations, and add use case context for better AI agent understanding.
